zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Dameral St Maur於1294年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾斯文頓時，她的父親William II de Damarell25歲，母親Mrs. William de Damarell24歲。她於1300年與Roger St Maur II在威爾士蒙姆爾福結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1372年享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Dameral St Maur于1294年出生在英国英格兰維爾爾斯文頓时，她的父亲William II de Damarell25岁，母亲Mrs. William de Damarell24岁。她于1300年与Roger St Maur II在威尔士蒙姆爾福结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1372年享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dameral
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Damerell
meanings: Norman: locative name from Aumale in Seine-Maritime, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’.

nameMeanings.name: St
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized spelling of French   St  .   Denis  .

variants.name: Denis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Camille, Jacques, Armand, Marcel, Andre, Pierre, Serge, Yvan, Alphonse, Edouard, Francois, Gaetane.  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Jorge, Roberto, Angel, Francisco, Joaquin, Juan, Manuel, Miguel, Ramon, Rolando.

French, Walloon, Breton, West Indian (mainly Haiti), German, Dutch, English, and Portuguese; Spanish and Galician (Denís): from the personal name Denis, Spanish and Galician Denís, from Latin Dionysius ‘(follower) of Dionysos’ (see Dennis ). Compare Dennee .
Ukrainian and Rusyn: variant transliteration of   Denys  , a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Maur
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: nickname for someone supposedly resembling a mouse, in appearance or timidity, from Middle High German mūs ‘mouse’.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): from German Maus ‘mouse’, one of the most common of the unflattering surnames imposed on Jews by non-Jewish government officials in 18th- and 19th-century central Europe.

variants.name: Muus
meanings: German (Hamburg): nickname for someone supposedly resembling a mouse, in appearance or timidity, from Middle High German mūs ‘mouse’. Compare Maus and Muhs .

variants.name: Muske
meanings: North German (also Müske): nickname from a diminutive of Middle Low German mūs ‘mouse’ (see Maus 1).

variants.name: Meisel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Russian Anatoliy, Boris, Leonid, Yefim.

variants.name: Mousel
meanings: Americanized form of German Mäusl, from a diminutive of Maus .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Dameral St Maur was born in 1294, in Swindon, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William II de Damarell, was 25 and her mother, Mrs. William de Damarell, was 24. She married Roger St Maur II in 1300, in Penhow, Monmouthshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1372, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Dameral St Maur est née en 1294, à Swindon, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William II de Damarell, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mrs. William de Damarell, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Roger St Maur II en 1300, à Penhow, Monmouthshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1372, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Dameral St Maur 1294 in Swindon, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William II de Damarell 25 und ihre Mutter Mrs. William de Damarell 24. Sie hat 1300 in Penhow, Monmouthshire, Wales Roger St Maur II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1372 im Alter von 78 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Dameral St Maur è nata il nel 1294 nel Swindon, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William II de Damarell, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Mrs. William de Damarell, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Roger St Maur II nel 1300, nel Penhow, Monmouthshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1372, all'età di 78 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Dameral St Maur(이)가 1294년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 스윈던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William II de Damarell(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. William de Damarell(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1300년 웨일스 몬모우스실르 펜호에서 Roger St Maur II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1372년 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Dameral St Maur родилась в 1294 г. в местности свиндон, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William II de Damarell было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. William de Damarell, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger St Maur II в 1300 г. в местности пеноу, монмоутшир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1372 г. в возрасте 78 лет.
